name: Grid import
description: Utility import at the campus intertie. Positive means importing from the grid.

name: Campus electric load
description: Total campus electric demand before on-site generation and storage.

name: CHP electric output
description: Combined heat and power electric output.

name: Battery discharge power
description: Battery power. Positive values discharge to support the campus.

name: Chiller plant electric power
description: Total electric power for the chilled-water plant.

name: Chilled water supply temperature
description: Leaving chilled-water temperature from the central plant.

name: Chilled water return temperature
description: Return chilled-water temperature from campus loads.

name: North chilled water flow
description: North branch chilled-water flow feeding critical clinical zones.

name: OR AHU cooling load
description: Cooling load for operating-room air handling units.

name: Steam boiler gas input
description: Gas input to steam boilers for reheat and sterilization.
